reference: Sir, I am eighteen years old. I used to masturbate four times a day after a gap of two to three days. I want to leave this problem in the past, but I am not able to. I want to stop this because after masturbating I felt weakness in my whole body and I am also unable to do any heavy work with my full effort, such as weight lifting, and I am also unable to think properly. I want to overcome this addiction; please help me!
text: Sir, I am 18 years old. I used to masturbate four times a day after a gap of two to three days. I want to leave this problem in the past, but I am not able to. I want to stop this because after masturbating, I felt weakness in my whole body, and I am also unable to do any heavy work with my full effort, such as weightlifting. And I am also unable to think properly. I want to overcome this addiction. Please help me.
